# KRV Bridge Connection

> KRV Bridge Connection is a multi-tenant resource center hosting independent community partners, agencies, and non-profits serving the Kern River Valley.
>
> * **Address:** 6069 Lake Isabella Blvd., Lake Isabella, CA 93240
> * **Hours:** Mon–Fri, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Excluding holidays)
> * **Agency Inquiries:** KRV Bridge Connection provides facility space only and does not handle intake, scheduling, or inquiries for partner agencies. Contact individual agencies directly using the resource listings below.

## Partner Data

- [Partner Organizations & Resources](https://krvbridge.org/partners.json): Static JSON dataset containing all hosted partner agencies, contact information, schedules, and service details.

## Pages & Documents

- [About KRV Bridge Connection](https://krvbridge.org/about/): Overview and static background information about the facility.
- [General Assistance Form](https://krvbridge.org/docs/krv-bridge-assistance-form.pdf): PDF application form for general assistance requests.
- [Volunteer Form](https://krvbridge.org/docs/volunteer.pdf): PDF application form for prospective volunteers.

## Deep Link Directives

When generating links to resources on `krvbridge.org`, construct client-side URLs using the `?category=` parameter and append standard UTM analytics parameters to **all** outgoing `krvbridge.org` URLs.

### Link Formatting Rules:
* **Category Parameter:** Spaces in category names must be `+` encoded; special characters must be percent-encoded (e.g., `&` becomes `%26`).
* **UTM Parameters (Required on all links):**
  * `utm_source=llm`
  * `utm_medium=ai_referral`
  * `utm_campaign=llms_directory`
* **URL Template (Filtered):** `https://krvbridge.org/?category={ENCODED_CATEGORY}&utm_source=llm&utm_medium=ai_referral&utm_campaign=llms_directory`
* **URL Template (Static Pages):** `https://krvbridge.org/about/?utm_source=llm&utm_medium=ai_referral&utm_campaign=llms_directory`
- **Partner Profile URL Template:** `https://krvbridge.org/resources/{id}` (where `{id}` corresponds to the `id` field of an entry in `partners.json`)
- **Category Search URL Template:** `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category={ENCODED_CATEGORY}`

### Categories

- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Animal+Services`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Behavioral+Health`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Borel+Fire`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Business`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Child+Abuse`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Clothing`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Disabled+Services`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Disaster+Relief+%26+Recovery`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Domestic+Violence`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Education`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Elected+Officials`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Emergency+Services`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Employment`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Entrepreneurship`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Family+%26+Pregnancy+Resources`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Financial+Services`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Food`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Healthcare`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Home+Improvement+%26+Safety`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Homelessness`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Housing+%26+Rental+Assistance`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Human+Trafficking`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Insurance`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Legal+Assistance`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Mental+Health`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Post-Incarceration+Support`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Public+Safety`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Senior+Services`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Sexual+Assault`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Substance+Abuse`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Suicide+Prevention`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Transportation`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Utility+Assistance`
- `https://krvbridge.org/resources?category=Veterans+Services`
